name: bats
description: Bats (Bash Automated Testing System) adapter. Dual-mode dispatch: test-runner mode executes bats suites and emits TAP-compliant pass/fail/skip; smell-detection mode lints .bats files for anti-patterns (bare run without assert_*, hardcoded absolute paths, untimed sleep, missing @test annotations). Five-file layout (adapter.json + probe.sh + run.sh + normalize.sh + test/contract.bats) extending the three-file base.
